identity.name: RecycleFlow OS
principles: Information at a Glance: Status must be readable from 3 meters away
Touch-First: Buttons are targets, not text. Minimum height 48px
Dark Mode Default: Optimized for dim control rooms
Color is Meaning: Never use color for decoration, only for status

headings.usage: Page titles, Digester IDs, Critical Alerts

usage_rules: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors with subtle noise texture.
Status colors must be used as 'lights' (glow effects) or borders, not just text color.
Dark mode surfaces must have a 1px border of white/10 (border-white/10) to define edges.

breakpoints.tablet: md (768px) - Switch from stack to grid

buttons.style: h-12 px-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm overflow-hidden relative
cards.special_feature: Status Bar: A 4px colored line at the top of the card indicating machine status (Green/Yellow/Red)

inputs.style: h-12 bg-background border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 text-lg

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay on the dark background to reduce banding and add 'industrial grit'.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-xl for floating panels, shadow-sm for embedded cards.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are mandatory in dark mode for contrast.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons press in (scale-95). Cards lift slightly on hover (hover:-translate-y-1).
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders for data. Spinning notched circle for actions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be at least 44x44px.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary for keyboard navigation.

login_bg.alt: Modern industrial recycling facility interior with blue containers
login_bg.usage: Full screen background for Login page with overlay

gate_truck.usage: Header image or card image for Gatekeeper Dashboard

general: Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on all interactive elements.
Implement a global ThemeToggle component in the navbar.

login.layout: Split screen or Centered Card on blurred background.

operator_dashboard.card_content: Digester ID (Header), Current Phase (Text), Timer (Huge Mono Font), Action Button (Start/Stop/Next Phase).

gate_dashboard.layout: Two columns: 'New Entry Form' (Left) and 'Recent Arrivals List' (Right).
gate_dashboard.form_fields: License Plate (Big Input), Weight (Number), Driver Name.

admin_dashboard.widgets: Production Chart (Recharts), Operator Efficiency Table, Maintenance Log.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center align the app container.
Always use named exports for components.
